allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Include ''*.html'',''*.js'',''*.json'',''*.css'' | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw -Encoding UTF8; if \($c -match ''ツール置き場''\) { $c -replace ''ツール置き場'',''ツール置き場'' | Set-Content $_.FullName -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host $_.FullName } }")
